title: cymbopogon pospischilii
intro: Cymbopogon pospischilii, also known as East Turkistan lemongrass, is a species of grass in the family Poaceae and a member of the lemongrass genus. It is native to the mountainous regions of East Turkistan, and has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Cymbopogon pospischilii include reducing fever, relieving pain and inflammation, and aiding in digestion. The plant can be used to prepare herbal teas, essential oils, and infusions, which can be taken orally or used topically to reap its benefits.
